name: SellerClaw UI
description: Web chat delivery channel for SellerClaw

apiBaseUrl.description: Base URL of the SellerClaw API (webhook ingest).

userId.description: SellerClaw user UUID for outbound messages.

internalWebhookSecret.description: Per-user delivery token (same value as OpenClaw hooks token: HMAC from agent API key).

primaryChannel.description: Preferred channel for owner-facing notifications (matches SellerClaw agent config).
